---
title: "Talks & Presentations"
pagetitle: Talks & Presentations
date-format: "DD MMM YYYY"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
toc: true
listing:
    - id: talks
      contents: "*/*.qmd"
      type: grid
      sort:
        - "date desc"
        - "title"
      categories: true
      fields: [date, title, event, categories, local, image]
---
